message:
bd-1gou, bd-3j1s: Wire console_builder and timing modules

Add console_builder.rs (bd-1gou):
- DemoConsole struct with shared Console and links toggle
- build_demo_console() applies theme, dimensions, color mode
- Color mode handling with force_terminal support
- Hyperlink auto-detection based on TTY status

Timing module (bd-3j1s) was already closed but untracked:
- Timing struct with speed/quick scaling
- DemoRng for deterministic pseudo-randomness

Both modules are now declared in demo_showcase.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
